name: arch-index
install:
git clone https://github.com/mathiasbourgoin/roster.git
cd roster
npm install
npm run build:ts
npm run extension -- install extensions/arch-index --target <project-root>
notes: SQLite queries against the index are deterministic. The OCaml CMT backend is sound (derived from dune-built .cmt typed ASTs); the LSP-backed language paths (go/rust/typescript/javascript/python) are best-effort per upstream arch-index (github.com/epure-team/arch-index).
